metadata.description: SEO & GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) for websites. Optimize for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot, Claude) and traditional search (Google, Bing). Includes Princeton GEO research methods for +40% AI visibility.
